title: Crafting Tree
description: Expanding Minecraft's "sandbox" aspect through crafting (and other tables).
body:
### It's not a mod that shows a branching tree of all crafting recipes, as cool as that would be, *but...*
---
Colored blocks, re-added items, extra tools, [QoL](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quality_of_life) recipe tweaks -- here's Crafting Tree, a mashup of simple items with a tweaked [vanilla](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorials/Game_terms#Vanilla) feel (without interrupting any [natural generation](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Seed_(level_generation))) all in one mod.

This mod includes *(as of the latest release)*:
- [April Fools'](https://minecraft.wiki/w/List_of_April_Fools%27_jokes) items
- Colored, [petrified](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Petrified_Oak_Slab) and [mosaic](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Bamboo_Mosaic) wood
- Dirt stuff
- Equality across multiple blocks _(stairs, slabs, walls, etc.)_
- More armor and equipment
- More mineral apples
- More potions and effects
- [Poisonous Potato](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_24w14potato) snapshot items
- Quality of Life recipes; such as [non-renewable](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Non-renewable_resource) items, slabs to block, re-dyeing and dye mixing, etc.
- Tables
- way too many stairs, slabs, pressure plates, buttons, fences... you get the idea.
---
If you want to watch progress on the mod or submit something to be added to the mod (including credit), you can join the Discord server listed on the Modrinth sidebar, give a few ideas and talk with a few other players in the process! (it'd also help to report bugs, which is greatly appreciated. i'm very prone to making mistakes)

Also recommended to use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei 'Just Enough items') or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei 'Roughly Enough Items (REI)') to find the recipes!

_Thank you for playing!_ **<3**
